notes: Comprehensive ITAD services across Japan. ISO 27001 and R2 (Responsible Recycling) compliant. Serves servers, PCs, smartphones, tablets, network equipment. Robust security with certified data destruction and data erasure certificates. Asset buyback services available.

name: SPAS Recycling
notes: ITAD solutions in India focused on e-waste reduction through dismantling, recycling, and redeployment. Secure logistics services with official certificates of disposal and recycling provided.

name: BRP Infotech
notes: ITAD services in India with certificates of data destruction and recycling documentation. Fully compliant services supporting sustainability initiatives for organizations.

name: Crapbin
notes: Professional ITAD services across India including secure data destruction, hardware disposal, and certified e-waste recycling. Comprehensive coverage across multiple Indian cities.

name: Luckily International
notes: Taiwan's only EPA-licensed ITAD provider with in-house processing facility. Ministry of Environment (MOE) supervision ensures full compliance. NIST SP 800.88 and NAID compliant data destruction. ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 27001 certified. On-site and off-site solutions, personalized corporate e-waste recycling service.

pipelineData.nextAction: Priority outreach - only EPA licensed provider

name: E&E Recycling
notes: Founded 1998, first professional e-waste recycling company in Asia. Strategic alliance of Taiwan's 12 major household appliance manufacturers for Extended Producer Responsibility. German ADELMANN Company partnership. ISO 14001:2015, ISO 45001 certified. Listed on OTC Markets since 2012. 1.4M waste appliances treated annually with 30% market share in Taiwan.

pipelineData.nextAction: High priority - first in Asia, established leader

name: SK TES Taiwan
notes: Global ITAD provider with Taiwan facility in Taipei. Services include ITAD, data destruction, Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR), managed deployment services, data center decommissioning, and e-waste recycling. Part of SK TES global network with 40+ owned sites worldwide.

name: Hong Kong Recycling Trading Company (HKRT)
notes: 20+ years experience providing secure, transparent and fully traceable ITAD services in Hong Kong. ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 27001, ISO 45001 certified. Strict chain-of-custody procedures including serial-number capture, video-recorded destruction, certified reporting and environmentally responsible processing. Trusted by global enterprises with IT operations in Hong Kong.

name: Brocent Asia
notes: Pan-Asia ITAD provider offering services across China, Hong Kong, Japan, Singapore and most Asian countries. Comprehensive services including e-waste recycling, data destruction using BLANCCO, IT asset remarketing, and full lifecycle management. DBS checked and security vetted personnel. Dedicated collections with constant transit security.
